headline: DEFINE WHO OWNS WHAT
subheading: Turn supplier contracts into audit-ready GMP and GDP agreements inspectors trust.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking a pharmaceutical quality technical agreement and the allocation of responsibility between two partners. A pristine document or signed contract page rendered as crisp folded paper rests on a polished dark surface, its lines abstracted into a clean grid of interlocking cells suggesting a responsibility matrix where every duty meets a single owner. Two elegant glowing nodes connected by a precise teal line symbolise contract giver and acceptor in balanced partnership, with subtle interlocking geometric shapes implying agreement and shared accountability. A faint embossed seal of approval and a sleek pen form glint at the edge of frame. Background dissolves into smooth deep navy bokeh with soft cyan light beams and a single fresh-green accent thread weaving through, conveying trust, precision, governance and clinical-luxury sophistication. Deep navy base, teal and cyan highlights, subtle fresh-green accent, shallow depth of field, refined premium materials, glass and brushed metal textures. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
